title: Microsoft Azure Training
content:
Microsoft Azure Training

Welcome to our comprehensive Microsoft Azure Online Training! This comprehensive Training program is designed to provide an in-depth understanding of cloud computing, Azure services, and their real-world applications. Whether you are a beginner eager to grasp the basics or an experienced IT professional aiming to enhance your skills, this Microsoft Azure Training will help you with the knowledge and expertise required to excel in the cloud computing industry.

About the Training Program

This Microsoft Azure Online Training Program provides a detailed roadmap to Microsoft Azure’s core certifications: AZ-900, AZ-104, AZ-204, and AZ-400, with real-world projects, live sessions, and hands-on exercises. By the end of the course, you will be proficient in Azure fundamentals, administration, development, and DevOps, empowering you to advance your career in cloud computing.

In this Microsoft Azure Training Program, you will have the opportunity to work on live projects, engage in interactive live sessions, and tackle hands-on exercises that ensure you gain practical experience. By the end of this program, you will be proficient in key Azure services and ready to solve real-world challenges in cloud computing.

New Batch Starts: November 21, 2024, from 6:30 AM to 8:30 AM IST

  • Registration Link: Click Here to Register

What Will You Learn?
  • AZ-900: Microsoft Azure Fundamentals
  • AZ-104: Microsoft Azure Administrator
  • AZ-204: Developing Solutions for Microsoft Azure
  • AZ-400: Designing and Implementing Microsoft DevOps Solutions
What is Microsoft Azure?

Microsoft Azure is a leading cloud computing platform offered by Microsoft. With over 200 services and multiple global regions, Azure enables businesses to build, deploy, and manage applications through Microsoft-managed data centers. Supporting various programming languages, tools, and frameworks, Azure is one of the most widely used cloud platforms in the industry.

Why Learn Microsoft Azure?

Cloud computing has revolutionized business operations, and Azure is at the forefront of this transformation. Learning Microsoft Azure opens up numerous career opportunities:

  • High Demand for Azure Professionals: Azure is a leader in the cloud market alongside AWS and Google Cloud, driving a high demand for skilled professionals.
  • Career Growth: Azure certifications enhance your credibility and open doors to roles such as cloud administrator, developer, architect, and DevOps engineer.
  • Future-Proof Skills: Proficiency in Azure ensures you stay relevant in an industry rapidly adopting cloud technologies.
  • Enterprise Adoption: Many Fortune 500 companies utilize Azure, making it an essential skill for IT professionals aiming to work in large-scale environments.
Prerequisites

No prior Azure experience is required. However, a basic understanding of networking, operating systems, and programming will be beneficial.

Azure Fundamentals – AZ900 Course Syllabus

Chapter 1: Introduction to Cloud Computing
Chapter 2: Introduction to Azure
Chapter 3: Azure Identity and Security Management
Chapter 4: Azure Cost Management
Chapter 5: Azure Governance
Chapter 6: Azure Management and Deployment
Chapter 7: Azure Compute Services
Chapter 8: Azure Storage
Chapter 9: Azure Networking
Chapter 10: Azure Monitoring

Azure Administrator – AZ104 Course Syllabus

Chapter 1: Microsoft Entra ID Management
Chapter 2: Resource and Access Management
Chapter 3: Azure Storage Management
Chapter 4: Virtual Machines and Containers
Chapter 5: App Service Management
Chapter 6: Virtual Networking Management
Chapter 7: ARM Templates
Chapter 8: Monitoring and Backup

Azure Developer Associate – AZ204 Course Syllabus

Chapter 1: Azure App Service Development
Chapter 2: Azure Containers
Chapter 3: Azure Functions Development
Chapter 4: Cosmos DB Development
Chapter 5: Authentication and Authorization
Chapter 6: Secure App Configuration and Encryption
Chapter 7: Caching
Chapter 8: Monitoring and Diagnostics
Chapter 9: API Management
Chapter 10: Event-Based Solutions

Azure DevOps – AZ400 Course Syllabus

Chapter 1: Introduction to DevOps 
Chapter 2: Design and implement a structured workflow with end-to-end visibility. 
Chapter 3:  Design and implement appropriate metrics and queries for DevOps. 
Chapter 4:  Configure collaborations and communications for DevOps. 
Chapter 5:  Design and implement branching strategies for the source code 
Chapter 6:  Design and implement a package management strategy 
Chapter 7:  Design and implement a testing strategy for pipelines 
Chapter 8:  Design and implement pipelines and deployments 
Chapter 9:  Design and implement Infrastructure as Code (IaC) 
Chapter 10:  Maintain Pipelines 
Chapter 11:  Design and implement authentication and authorization methods 
Chapter 12:  Design and implement a strategy for managing sensitive information in automation 
Chapter 13:  Implement automated scanning for security and compliance. 
Chapter 14:  Configure monitoring for a DevOps environment 
Chapter 15:  Analyze metrics from instrumentation 

Note: After the end of each chapter, there will be question-and-answer preparations for the AZ 900, AZ104, AZ 204, and AZ 400 exams and practice tests. 

Enroll Today!

Take the first step towards becoming a Microsoft Azure expert. With our comprehensive training, hands-on projects, interactive sessions, and expert guidance, you’ll gain the skills needed to excel in cloud computing.

Don’t miss this opportunity! Enroll now and embark on a journey to advance your career in the cloud industry.
